# Nick Rae

> Commercial pilot, FeedFare creator, iOS developer, and AI builder based in Merced, CA. Building side income through apps, prediction markets, and automation to fund flight hours toward an airline career.

## About

Nick Rae is a Commercial Instrument Multi-Engine rated pilot with 371.0 flight hours, working toward 500 hours for Part 135 and eventually 1,500 hours for ATP certification. He builds iOS apps, publishes aviation study materials on Amazon KDP, sells The Non-Developer's OpenClaw Playbook, and documents the Flight Funded experiment at nickrae.net. His Kalshi weather bot is paused until calibration earns trust.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://nickrae.net/)
- [Blog](https://nickrae.net/blog/)
- [The Non-Developer's OpenClaw Playbook](https://nickrae.net/openclaw-playbook/) — $99 full PDF plus Starter Kit ZIP
- [Flight Funded](https://nickrae.net/flight-funded/) — tracking side hustle income funding flight hours
- [FeedFare](https://nickrae.net/feedfare/) — trade steps for screen time (iOS)
- [Inflection Point](https://nickrae.net/inflection/) — personal growth OS (iOS)

## Digital Products

- [The Non-Developer's OpenClaw Playbook](https://nicholasrae.gumroad.com/l/openclaw-playbook) — 163-page guide plus Starter Kit ZIP for building AI-agent workflows, automations, audits, and content pipelines without writing code. $99 on Gumroad.
